zh.Dunston, South Staffordshire district, S: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾登斯頓
zh.Aldersgate Ward of London, City of Londo: 英國英格蘭倫敦阿爾德斯蓋特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton於1519年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾登斯頓時，她的父親Christopher Ashton Sr.26歲，母親Lady Catherine Gordon47歲。她於1545年與Captain Henry Dudley在英國波克夏費費爾德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1556年11月15日在英國英格蘭倫敦阿爾德斯蓋特享年37歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton于1519年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾登斯頓时，她的父亲Christopher Ashton Sr.26岁，母亲Lady Catherine Gordon47岁。她于1545年与Captain Henry Dudley在英国波克夏費費爾德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1556年11月15日在英国英格兰倫敦阿爾德斯蓋特享年37岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦。

nameMeanings.name: Ashton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places so called, especially Ashton-under-Lyne near Manchester. Most are named from Old English æsc ‘ash tree’ + tūn ‘settlement’; the one in Northamptonshire is (æt thǣm) æscum ‘(at the) ash trees’. Others have been assimilated to this from different sources. The one in Devon is ‘the settlement (tūn) of Æschere’, while the one in Hertfordshire is ‘the settlement of Ælli’.

variants.name: Aspden
meanings: English: habitational name from Aspden (alias Aspen) in Oswaldtwistle, Lancashire. This surname has been confused with   Ashton   and   Austin  , and probably also with   Aston   and   Astin  , all of which are common surnames in Lancashire.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton was born in 1519, in Dunston, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Christopher Ashton Sr., was 26 and her mother, Lady Catherine Gordon, was 47. She married Captain Henry Dudley in 1545, in Fyfield, Berkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 15 November 1556, in Aldersgate, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37, and was buried in London, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton est née en 1519, à Dunston, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Christopher Ashton Sr., avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Catherine Gordon, avait 47 ans. Elle a épousé Captain Henry Dudley en 1545, à Fyfield, Berkshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 15 novembre 1556, à Aldersgate, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton 1519 in Dunston, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Christopher Ashton Sr. 26 und ihre Mutter Lady Catherine Gordon 47. Sie hat 1545 in Fyfield, Berkshire, England Captain Henry Dudley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 15. November 1556 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Aldersgate, London, England, United Kingdom und wurde in London, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton è nata il nel 1519 nel Dunston, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Christopher Ashton Sr., aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Lady Catherine Gordon, aveva 47 anni. Lei sposato Captain Henry Dudley nel 1545, nel Fyfield, Berkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 15 novembre 1556, nel Aldersgate, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a London, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashtonが1519年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアダンストンで生まれた時，父Christopher Ashton Sr.は26歳，母Lady Catherine Gordonは47歳であった。1545年にイギリスバークシュアイアフイフィールドでCaptain Henry Dudleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1556年11月15日にイギリスイギリスロンドンアルダースガトで37歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton(이)가 1519년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 던스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Christopher Ashton Sr.(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Catherine Gordon(은)는 47세였다. 그녀는 1545년 영국 버크실르 피필드에서 Captain Henry Dudley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1556년 11월 15일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 알더스가트에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton nasceu em 1519, em Dunston, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Christopher Ashton Sr., tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Catherine Gordon, tinha 47 anos. Ela casou-se com Captain Henry Dudley em 1545, em Fyfield, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 15 de novembro de 1556, em Aldersgate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 37 anos, e foi sepultada em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton родилась в 1519 г. в местности дунстон, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Christopher Ashton Sr. было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Catherine Gordon, 47. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Captain Henry Dudley в 1545 г. в местности фифиелд, биркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 15 ноября 1556 г. в местности алдирсгэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth Anne Ashton nació en 1519, en Dunston, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Christopher Ashton Sr., tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Catherine Gordon, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Captain Henry Dudley en 1545, en Fyfield, Berkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 15 de noviembre de 1556, en Aldersgate, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
